---
title: GitHub, the OSC Organization, and Repositories
subtitle: How we use GitHub for collaboration and hosting our code and content
---

* This chapter provides an overview of GitHub, the OSC's GitHub organization, and how we use repositories to manage our code and content.
* It covers the structure of our GitHub organization, the types of repositories we have, and best practices for using GitHub effectively in our workflow.
* This is essential reading for anyone contributing to our projects, as GitHub is central to how we collaborate and manage our work.
